Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 105}Oh, hey. I didn't expect to see you somewhere other than the club.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 105}There's been a lot of discussion on the Internet lately about cults and mysterious incidents...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 105}But I'm sure whoever knows what's really going on isn't on the Internet...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 105}Besides, even if there were an explanation, I'm not sure I could trust it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 105}What's true and what's false... Those who cannot discern the difference will not survive.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 105}Only those who have the ability to discern truth from falsehood can survive in this digital age.[n]{f 1 1}
